Background Styling: Style's Background Color (light mode) or solid Primary Color (dark mode)
Title Styling: Heading Font (weight 600 size heading-3xl) colored in Primary Color
Content Placeholder Styling: Presenter details / date using Body Font (weight 400 size body-md) in Style's Secondary Text Color

Standard Role: Bullet lists or single main graphic
Grid Structure: Top title bar with large content container below
Title Styling: Heading Font (weight 500 size heading-2xl) colored in Primary Color
Content Placeholder Styling: 3-5 bullets using Body Font (size body-md) in Style's Secondary Text Color (bullet icons colored with Accent Color)

Grid Structure: Centered horizontal split or full flood
Background Styling: Solid block flood of Primary Color or Accent Color
Title Styling: Heading Font (weight 600 size heading-3xl) in contrast color (White/Light)
Content Placeholder Styling: Detail text using Body Font (size body-md) in contrast color (80% opacity) or Accent Color

Standard Role: Side-by-side text comparisons or text with visual
Grid Structure: Top title bar with two equal-width columns below
Title Styling: Heading Font (size heading-2xl) colored in Primary Color
Content Placeholder Styling: Col 1: Bullets using Body Font | Col 2: Graphic/card card using Style's Card Background Color with Style's Border Radius and Style's Card Border Color

Grid Structure: Top title bar with two column headers and two container cards
Title Styling: Heading Font (size heading-2xl) colored in Primary Color
Content Placeholder Styling: Col headers: Heading Font (size heading-md) in Accent | Col cards: Style's Card Background Color with Style's Border Radius and Style's Card Border Color

Standard Role: Timelines or custom metric row grids
Grid Structure: Top title bar with empty canvas grid below
Title Styling: Heading Font (size heading-2xl) colored in Primary Color
Content Placeholder Styling: Canvas populated with stats using Accent Color (size stat-med) and labels in Body Font

Grid Structure: Full screen split with no default placeholders
Background Styling: Full bleed image or solid style gradient
Title Styling: None (or floating glass overlay container: transparent glassmorphic fill with style-conforming contrast text)
Content Placeholder Styling: Custom overlays use transparent glassmorphic fill (rgba white 0.15 with backdrop blur 15px) and style-conforming contrast text

Standard Role: Key metrics focus or single highlighted benefit
Grid Structure: Asymmetric split (1/3 sidebar and 2/3 main card)
Title Styling: Sidebar title uses Heading Font (size heading-xl) | Caption uses Body Font (size body-sm) in Style's Secondary Text Color
Content Placeholder Styling: Main container holds quote card (using Style's Card Background Color, Style's Border Radius, Style's Card Border Color, Body Font italic size body-lg) or screenshot

Standard Role: Speaker profiles or annotated screenshot guides
Grid Structure: 50/50 split (left picture card and right caption content)
Title Styling: Caption side uses Eyebrow (Accent Color) + Heading Font (size heading-xl) + Body Font description in Style's Secondary Text Color
Content Placeholder Styling: Left side holds image/screenshot card with Style's Border Radius
